title: astragalus efoliatus
intro: Astragalus efoliatus, also known as milk vetch or goat's-thorn, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus efoliatus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus efoliatus can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
